patterns.name: Cloudflare API Token
patterns.description: Cloudflare API token used to manage zones, DNS, Workers, and account settings
patterns.risk: CRITICAL: Full or scoped control of Cloudflare account resources (DNS, WAF, Workers, R2, etc.).
patterns.fix: Use CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN environment variable. Scope tokens with least privilege and rotate immediately if exposed.

patterns.name: Cloudflare Global API Key
patterns.risk: CRITICAL: Unrestricted account access. Prefer scoped API tokens instead of the global key.
patterns.fix: Prefer CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN with least privilege. If a global key was committed, rotate it immediately.
